prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业近年持续高热推荐，与该校统计学、软件工程、计算机等优势专业高度契合；贵州2026年高考总人数约299000人，较2025年（297258人）小幅增长，物理类考生估算约20.8万人，竞争略有加剧；华东师范大学位于上海，属于一线城市高校，对贵州考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在贵州招生占比约1.5%-2%（2025年约9人/598总计划），属于跨省招生中占比偏低的省份，招生规模相对稳定。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 2003 → 3802 → 7237 → 4809 → 3317. Rankings continuously declined from 2021 to 2023, then significantly advanced to 4809 in 2024 (the first year of the new Gaokao), and further recovered to 3317 in 2025, showing a clear warming trend in the last two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 3317. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Guizhou: 34 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 50 in 2024, 46 in 2025, and 45 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 1 student, a decrease of about 2.2%, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 29th (Top 30), with stable rankings between 28-31 in recent years, making it a top-tier normal university in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation data does not list this university separately. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranks 28th, rated as 'relatively hot', with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting generally above-average application attention. No significant admission gaps have been observed in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 14 disciplines including Education (A+), Physical Education (A+), Statistics (A+), Psychology (A), Chinese Language and Literature (A), Geography (A), Mathematics (A), Software Engineering (A), and World History (A) were rated A-/A/A+, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been highly recommended in recent years, aligning well with the university's strengths in Statistics, Software Engineering, and Computer Science. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou in 2026 is approximately 299,000, a slight increase from 2025 (297,258), with physics category candidates estimated at about 208,000, leading to slightly intensified competition. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal for Guizhou candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is about 1.5%-2% (approximately 9 out of 598 total planned spots in 2025), making it a province with a relatively low cross-provincial enrollment share, and the enrollment scale is relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3317, the reduction of 1 enrollment spot in 2026 (easing competition), a slight increase in physics category candidates (intensifying competition), stable university level, above-average Douyin popularity, and strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, the predicted 2026 ranking is as follows: Predicted minimum ranking approximately 3257, with a range of 2886-3628.
